purpose.summary: This BMS map defines the screen layout for displaying pending authorization details in the CardDemo application. It includes fields for card number, authorization date/time, response, amount, merchant details, and other relevant information.
purpose.business_context: This screen is used to view details of pending card authorizations, likely as part of a fraud detection or customer service workflow.

paragraphs.purpose: This DFHMSD macro defines the map set COPAU01, which is the highest-level structure in the BMS map definition. It specifies various control options for the map, including alarm settings (ALARM), keyboard handling (FREEKB), extended attributes (EXTATT=YES), programming language (LANG=COBOL), input/output mode (MODE=INOUT), storage management (STORAGE=AUTO), terminal I/O area prefixing (TIOAPFX=YES), and map type (TYPE=&&SYSPARM). It acts as a container for the individual map definitions within the set, defining the overall characteristics of the screen.
paragraphs.dead_code_reason: Artifact 'COPAU01' (map) is never referenced by any other artifact in the dependency graph

paragraphs.purpose: This DFHMDI macro defines the map COPAU1A, which represents a single screen layout within the COPAU01 mapset. It specifies the screen's position (COLUMN=1, LINE=1) and size (SIZE=(24,80)), indicating a full-screen map. This macro acts as a container for the individual field definitions (DFHMDF macros) that make up the screen's content. It defines the overall dimensions and placement of the screen elements.
paragraphs.dead_code_reason: Screen/Map 'COPAU1A' is never sent to or received from by any program
